allow: Bash(node -e "const en = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/shared/i18n/locales/en.json', 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('people.modal.edit_title:', en.people?.modal?.edit_title\); console.log\('people.roles.Volunteer:', en.people?.roles?.Volunteer\);")

Bash(node -e "const en = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('src/shared/i18n/locales/en.json', 'utf-8'\)\); const findKey = \(obj, path = ''\) => { if \(typeof obj !== 'object' || obj === null\) return; for \(const k of Object.keys\(obj\)\) { if \(k === 'people'\) console.log\(\\`path: \\${path}.\\${k}, keys:\\`, Object.keys\(obj[k]\)\); findKey\(obj[k], path + '.' + k\); } }; findKey\(en\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; comments=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'File: {c[\\"path\\"]}:{c[\\"line\\"]}\\nBody: {c[\\"body\\"]}\\n---'\) for c in comments]")
